releaseArtifactVerification.command: gh release download v1.33.0 --pattern submit.zip; shasum -a 256 submit.zip

discardedAttempts.reason: npm-exec wrapper state caused the nested Playwright npx invocation to exit with npm usage error after preceding compiler lanes passed; the clean PATH-pinned replay replaced this attempt

knownLimitations.claimEffect: No Haxe 5 compatibility claim; supported Haxe 4.3.7 evidence remains green.

knownLimitations.cause: The authoritative compiler workflow was a push event; this job is pull-request-only.

changeDecision.reason: The released generic compiler passed the complete supported release gate; no WordPress-specific or generic compiler fix was required.
